framework.name: Microservice Lineage as Governance Proxy
framework.description: Ocado uses its existing microservice event architecture for ML model governance — tracing data lineage through service events rather than building dedicated ML governance tooling. Governance piggybacks on existing engineering culture rather than being purpose-built for AI.
framework.raw_quote: because of the microservice culture at Ocado, events that occur can be traced back in terms of lineage

source.title: How These 8 Companies Implement MLOps: In-Depth Guide
